channel.title: AI News — A Guide to Cloud & AI
channel.description: Daily AI news digest — curated headlines, summaries and trends

item.title: Royal Navy chief backs drones, autonomous weapons in ‘Hybrid Navy’
item.description: The Royal Navy chief has proposed a 'Hybrid Navy' that integrates crewed ships with drones and autonomous weapons to enhance operational capabilities. This approach aims to address the challenges of a stretched fleet and ensure effective defense and overseas operations.

item.title: Job's a good 'un: Bank of England tech project wins watchdog praise
item.description: The Bank of England's tech project has received praise from Parliament's spending watchdog for its successful large-scale transformation, highlighting it as a model for public sector efficiency. This recognition contrasts with the usual reports of failures and overspending in similar initiatives.

item.title: keeperhub-langchain 0.3.1
item.description: The release of keeperhub-langchain 0.3.1 introduces a toolkit for reliable on-chain execution and AI workflow generation for LangChain agents. This update enhances the capabilities of DeFi protocol actions.

item.title: Hey Chat, Make Me a Fake ID
item.description: OpenAI's tools have been identified as potentially aiding scammers in creating fake identities, raising concerns about misuse of AI technology. This highlights the ethical implications of AI advancements.

item.title: Mathematicians Claim Significant Discovery Using ChatGPT
item.description: Mathematicians have reportedly made a significant discovery regarding large numbers, utilizing ChatGPT as part of their research process. This finding could lead to new insights in mathematical theory.

item.title: decisionguard added to PyPI
item.description: The DecisionGuard runtime governance SDK has been added to PyPI, providing tools for governance in Python agent frameworks. This addition aims to enhance the management of AI decision-making processes.

item.title: aicortex-core 1.0.0
item.description: AICortex 1.0.0 has been launched, offering a free LLM API toolkit that supports multiple language models via Ollama servers. This toolkit includes features like real-time streaming and multi-server orchestration.

item.title: aicortex-core added to PyPI
item.description: The AICortex toolkit has also been added to PyPI, reinforcing its availability for developers looking to integrate various language models easily. This supports a growing ecosystem of AI tools.

item.title: graphton 0.3.4
item.description: The graphton 0.3.4 update introduces a declarative agent creation framework for LangGraph, enhancing the capabilities for building AI agents. This framework aims to streamline the development process.

item.title: sutra-cli 0.2.0
item.description: Sutra-cli 0.2.0 has been released, focusing on governed AI coding flow for Codex/Gemini and Claude Code, aiming to enhance coding practices with AI oversight.

item.title: concinno 5.1.1
item.description: Concinno 5.1.1 introduces AI behavior governance features for Claude Code, enhancing safety with tools like input rewriting and LLM-as-Judge.

item.title: Tenstorrent Vows to ‘Crush Everyone’ as Galaxy Blackhole Hits 350 Tokens/s on DeepSeek R1, Undercutting NVIDIA’s GB300 5x AI TCO
item.description: Tenstorrent claims their Galaxy servers outperform NVIDIA's GPUs, promising 10x faster generative AI video processing and a significant reduction in AI total cost of ownership.

item.title: pycastle 0.1.3.7.dev0
item.description: Pycastle 0.1.3.7.dev0 is a Python orchestrator designed for managing autonomous Claude Code agents within Docker environments.

item.title: Sam Altman invites Elon Musk to OpenAI’s GPT-5.5 private event amid ongoing legal dispute
item.description: Sam Altman has invited Elon Musk to a private event for OpenAI's GPT-5.5, amidst ongoing legal disputes between them.

item.title: ntn 0.6.2
item.description: Ntn 0.6.2 is a minimal AI coding agent that utilizes Claude Opus 4.7 and GPT-5.5, capable of executing commands in various shell environments.

item.title: ntn 0.6.1
item.description: Ntn 0.6.1, similar to its successor, is a minimal AI coding agent powered by Claude Opus 4.7 and GPT-5.5, designed for command execution in shell environments.

item.title: Elon Musk Celebrates Starlink Launch in Papua New Guinea Bringing Internet to Remote Nation
item.description: Elon Musk announced the launch of Starlink internet service in Papua New Guinea, expanding connectivity to remote areas.

item.title: Palantir Comes to Campus
item.description: At a conference at Yale, Palantir discussed its vision for integrating AI with state power, outlining potential collaborations.

item.title: The limits of large language models in clinical practice
item.description: The article examines the practical limitations of large language models in clinical settings, despite their growing integration into medical workflows.

item.title: YouTube Premium vs. Premium Lite: Is the cheaper tier still your best deal?
item.description: The article compares YouTube Premium and Premium Lite, helping users decide which subscription tier offers the best value for ad-free viewing.

item.title: Supercharging the RTX 5090 in PhysX games using an RTX 5060 as a secondary GPU — SLI may be dead, but how much can dual GPUs boost performance in classic PhysX titles?
item.description: Testing shows that using an RTX 5060 as a secondary GPU can enhance performance in classic PhysX games when paired with an RTX 5090. This method revives interest in dual GPU setups despite the decline of SLI technology.

item.title: Apple warns Mac mini and Mac Studio shortages could last for months — local AI boom and memory crunch drive demand beyond Apple’s manufacturing capacity
item.description: Apple CEO Tim Cook warns that shortages of the Mac mini and Mac Studio could persist for months due to high demand from developers for AI-capable systems. This surge is driven by the growing need for local AI processing capabilities.

item.title: Build a GPU Lab for the NVIDIA NCA-AIIO Exam with RunPod (Beginner Tutorial)
item.description: This beginner tutorial guides users on how to build a GPU lab for the NVIDIA NCA-AIIO Exam using RunPod. It aims to help learners set up the necessary environment for their studies.

item.title: litert-torch-nightly 0.10.0.dev20260502
item.description: The release of litert-torch-nightly 0.10.0.dev20260502 introduces support for converting PyTorch models with LiteRT. This enhancement aims to improve model deployment efficiency.

item.title: torchax 0.0.12.dev20260502
item.description: torchax 0.0.12.dev20260502 is a new library that enables the integration of Jax and PyTorch, allowing developers to leverage both frameworks in their projects.

item.title: SCOPE-RTM 0.4.2
item.description: SCOPE-RTM 0.4.2 is a PyTorch reimplementation of the SCOPE radiative transfer model, providing a new tool for researchers in atmospheric sciences.

item.title: spatial-ninjas-research added to PyPI
item.description: The spatial-ninjas-research package has been added to PyPI, offering reusable utilities for spatial analysis and route evaluation. This aims to enhance development in spatial computing.

item.title: langchain-keiro added to PyPI
item.description: The langchain-keiro integration package has been added to PyPI, facilitating connections between Keiro and LangChain for developers. This integration aims to streamline workflows in AI applications.

item.title: langchain-keiro 0.1.0
item.description: langchain-keiro 0.1.0 is an integration package that connects Keiro and LangChain, providing developers with tools to enhance their AI projects. This release aims to improve interoperability.

item.title: Meta layoffs: More cuts possible after 10% workforce reduction on May 20
item.description: Meta's chief people officer indicated that further layoffs may occur following a 10% workforce reduction. This reflects ongoing adjustments in response to competitive pressures and changing business priorities.

item.title: Y Combinator built its empire on software. Its latest investment thesis says the garage is no longer enough.
item.description: Y Combinator's latest investment thesis emphasizes the need for hardware and capital in startups, moving beyond traditional software-focused ventures. This shift reflects the evolving landscape of entrepreneurship and innovation.

item.title: gemcode 0.3.121
item.description: Gemcode 0.3.121 is a local-first coding agent designed for Google Gemini and ADK, enhancing coding capabilities in local environments. This update aims to improve user experience and efficiency.

item.title: Google is finally fixing its most annoying design mistake
item.description: Google is addressing a significant design flaw in its apps, allowing users to distinguish between them more easily. This change aims to improve user experience and app usability.

item.title: GitHub Copilot Switches to Token-Based Billing From June 1, Replacing Premium Request Model
item.description: GitHub Copilot will transition to a token-based billing system starting June 1, 2026, replacing the current Premium Requests model. This change aims to streamline billing and usage tracking for users.

item.title: Inside the Musk–OpenAI trial: Key moments from the billion-dollar legal battle
item.description: Elon Musk is suing OpenAI, claiming it has strayed from its nonprofit mission towards profit-making. He seeks to restore OpenAI's original purpose and accountability.

item.title: nvidia-nat-llama-index 1.7.0a20260502
item.description: Nvidia's subpackage for Llama-Index integration in the NeMo Agent Toolkit has been updated to version 1.7.0a20260502. This update enhances the toolkit's capabilities for AI development.

item.title: nvidia-nat-langchain 1.7.0a20260502
item.description: Nvidia's subpackage for LangChain/LangGraph integration in the NeMo Agent Toolkit has also been updated to version 1.7.0a20260502, improving its functionality for AI applications.

item.title: Nvidia Stock 2026 Outlook Strong Buy Signals Dominate as AI Demand Fuels Optimism
item.description: Nvidia's stock outlook for 2026 is strong, with analysts recommending a buy due to surging AI demand and robust earnings growth. This positions Nvidia as a key player in the AI market.

item.title: I went to an 'AI psychosis' party in NYC filled with zany art, vibe-coded apps, and Diet Coke
item.description: An 'AI psychosis' party in NYC showcased art and apps inspired by AI, reflecting a cultural fascination with artificial intelligence. The event highlighted the intersection of creativity and technology.

item.title: mnemostack 0.3.0
item.description: Mnemostack 0.3.0 introduces a memory stack for AI agents, featuring advanced retrieval and inference capabilities. This update aims to enhance AI performance in memory-related tasks.

item.title: AI music is flooding streaming platforms. But listeners like it less and less
item.description: A recent study shows that music fans are increasingly uncomfortable with AI-generated songs, indicating a potential backlash against AI in the music industry.

item.title: Some post-secondary schools in the Maritimes are embracing AI — but drawing careful lines
item.description: Post-secondary institutions in Atlantic Canada are integrating AI into their curricula, focusing on responsible use rather than replacement of traditional learning methods.

item.title: ChatGPT Free – Chat instantly with multiple AI models, no login or limits
item.description: A new platform allows users to chat with multiple AI models instantly without the need for login or limits, enhancing accessibility to AI technology.

item.title: Why Does Wikipedia Think I’m Evan Spiegel?
item.description: An individual discovers their photo has mistakenly appeared on Snap CEO Evan Spiegel's Wikipedia page, raising questions about online identity and accuracy.

item.title: Republicans Can’t Contain Their Glee Over the Death of the VRA
item.description: Elie Mystal discusses the Republican Party's reaction to the Supreme Court's Voting Rights decision, alongside commentary on tech figures like Musk and Altman.

item.title: neuroncli 3.2.0
item.description: Neuroncli 3.2.0 is introduced as a free alternative to Claude Code, featuring a native Rust binary and support for Azure AI and OpenRouter.

item.title: graphton 0.3.2
item.description: Graphton 0.3.2 is released as a framework for creating declarative agents within LangGraph, enhancing local AI development.

item.title: env-doctor 0.3.2
item.description: Env-doctor 0.3.2 is a command-line tool designed to ensure compatibility in AI/ML environments, offering installation guides for different platforms.

item.title: dabbler-ai-router added to PyPI
item.description: Dabbler-ai-router has been added to PyPI, providing multi-provider model routing and session management for AI workflows.

item.title: graphton 0.3.1
item.description: Graphton 0.3.1 is released, continuing the development of the declarative agent creation framework for LangGraph.
